name: Spinach-Bacon Salad with Warm Dressing
recipeIngredient: 1 Small red onion, peeled and sliced
2 tsp Dijon or prepared spicy brown mustard
recipeInstructions:
1. Trim the spinach of coarse stems and blemished leaves, and wash.
2. Pat the spinach dry with paper towels, tear into bite-size pieces, and put into a large serving bowl along with the mushrooms and onion.
3. Set aside the salad.
4. Cook the bacon in a 12-inch skillet over moderately high heat until crisp -- about 5 minutes.
5. Drain on paper towels and reserve.
6. Reduce the heat to low.
7. Add the mustard, sugar, vinegar, Worcestershire sauce, and lemon juice to the drippings. Stir to mix well.
8. Pour the dressing over the salad, crumble the bacon over it, and toss thoroughly.
9. Serve immediately.
